readiness_scale.5: Initiation-ready: sponsor can approve and delivery can plan from it.
readiness_scale.4: Mostly ready: minor gaps remain but no major governance defects.
readiness_scale.3: Partially ready: usable draft but important facts or decisions are missing.
readiness_scale.2: Weak: significant ambiguity in scope, ownership, outcomes, or governance.
readiness_scale.1: Not ready: mostly aspirational, ownerless, or not bounded.

criteria.name: Purpose and business outcome
checks: References business outcome without rearguing the business case

criteria.name: Success measures
checks: Targets or baseline gaps called out

criteria.name: Risks and dependencies
checks: Named dependency owners or missing owners flagged

fatal_defects: No named sponsor or approval body
No governance rhythm or escalation path
Charter spends more effort selling the business case than authorizing the work
